title: REPRESENTATION-COMPARISON-V2 Regional ATOMS-EVA Comparison
question: Does ATOMS preserve more held-out regional predictive structure than EVA under a matched local-context protocol?
result: ATOMS had lower normalized log-loss, higher top-1 accuracy, and lower unseen-context rate than EVA over aligned regions.
interpretation: Exploratory evidence that ATOMS-V1 captures transferable regional structure better than EVA under this protocol.
